Question
========

I have already used `git push` and `git pull` (either in the console or a desktop app) to retrieve files from and send them to the online repository.


Answerlist
----------
* Yes, off the top of my head.
* Yes, with a little bit of internet search / consulting the course material / help files.
* Only with a lot of ChatGPT.
* I'm completely clueless - what are you talking about??


Solution
========
This is a feedback question, there is **no correct answer**.
All options are acceptable; the "solution" below is only a
technical requirement for R/exams and is ignored while analyzing the results.

Meta-information
================
exname: skill_git_1
extype: schoice
exsolution: 1000
expoints: 0
exshuffle: FALSE
